title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 79.090 - Board to select an acting president, term
text:
79.090.  Board to select an acting president, term. — The board shall elect one of their own number who shall be styled "acting president of the board of aldermen" and who shall serve for a term of one year.
(RSMo 1939 § 7111, A.L. 1983 S.B. 234) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 6961; 1919 § 8412; 1909 § 9314
